descriptions.barChart: Visualize the relationship between a qualitative and a quantitative variable using grouped bars.
descriptions.codeFromScratch: Write custom code to build fully tailored analyses or visuals.
descriptions.correlationalHypothesis: Hypothesis about the degree and direction of the linear relationship between two quantitative variables.
descriptions.experimentalHypothesis: Hypothesis about the difference in means between groups defined by a qualitative independent variable.
descriptions.histogram: Show the distribution of values for a quantitative variable in your dataset.
descriptions.oneWayAnova: Compare means across three or more groups when your independent variable is qualitative.
descriptions.pearsonCorrelation: Examine the degree and direction of the linear relationship between two quantitative variables.
descriptions.scatterPlot: Visualize the relationship between two quantitative variables.
descriptions.summary: Generate key descriptive statistics for selected data (mean, median, mode, etc.).
descriptions.table: Insert a structured table to show your dataset values.
descriptions.textBlock: Add notes, interpretation, and context to your analysis.
descriptions.tTest: Compare means between two groups when your independent variable is qualitative with 2 groups.

database.csvDownloadMessage: Give a name to the CSV you're about to download\nNo need to add '.csv' we're taking care of that!
